scope.goal: Extract product and architecture patterns for Quantum without copying vendor implementations or expanding runtime scope in M2.

methodology.source_policy: Official public product pages only for scored claims.
methodology.score_meaning: Weighted public-evidence fit to Quantum requirements, not vendor quality, accuracy, security, price/value or a procurement recommendation.
red_team_caveats: No demo account or hands-on product validation was performed.
No vendor calculation was reconciled against a known financial truth set.
No pricing, SLA, accessibility, browser-render or load test was performed.
Marketing and security claims remain vendor assertions unless independently verified.
Marketplace competitor estimates must be treated as hypotheses with provenance and confidence.
Capabilities and public pages can change after the retrieval date.

platforms.name: Triple Whale
platforms.public_evidence_summary: Unified ecommerce data, measurement, dashboards, custom BI and AI-driven action planning.
platforms.red_team_limitation: Strong command-center and semantic-data patterns; activation and autonomous execution conflict with Quantum's recommendation-only boundary.

platforms.name: Northbeam
platforms.public_evidence_summary: Marketing intelligence focused on multi-touch attribution, incrementality, MMM, product and creative analytics.
platforms.red_team_limitation: Useful measurement discipline; attribution-heavy scope is not the first priority for a marketplace finance core.

platforms.name: Daasity
platforms.public_evidence_summary: Omnichannel analytics combining sales, marketing and inventory with managed data infrastructure.
platforms.red_team_limitation: Useful canonical data model and omnichannel reporting patterns; cloud/warehouse assumptions require adaptation.

platforms.name: Polar Analytics
platforms.public_evidence_summary: Commerce BI with connectors, semantic layer, warehouse, incrementality and AI analyst/media/inventory agents.
platforms.red_team_limitation: High pattern fit for profit-first decision support; autonomous agents and cloud warehouse must not be copied directly.

platforms.name: Glew
platforms.public_evidence_summary: Commerce data platform with automated ELT, validation, warehouse, integrations and customizable analytics.
platforms.red_team_limitation: Strong data-contract, validation and custom-reporting patterns; enterprise data stack is heavier than the local pilot.

platforms.name: DataHawk
platforms.public_evidence_summary: Marketplace analytics for sales, ads, SEO, inventory and profitability, with issue detection and next-action guidance.
platforms.red_team_limitation: Closest public pattern match for prioritized marketplace problems, causes and actions; estimated competitor data must remain probabilistic.

platforms.name: Pacvue
platforms.public_evidence_summary: Commerce operations and media platform spanning digital shelf, measurement, competitive intelligence and automation.
platforms.red_team_limitation: Mission-control and revenue-recovery patterns are relevant; execution, bid and campaign automation are explicitly out of scope.

platforms.name: MPSTATS
platforms.public_evidence_summary: Marketplace analytics for WB, Ozon and Yandex Market, including niches, competitors, ads, SKU audits and AI tools.
platforms.red_team_limitation: Strong regional data taxonomy and competitive-intelligence patterns; public claims do not establish calculation accuracy.

platforms.name: Moneyplace
platforms.public_evidence_summary: Marketplace analytics with financial dashboards, unit economics, competitor tracking, SEO and ad automation.
platforms.red_team_limitation: Useful unit-economics and multi-dashboard coverage; automation and opaque estimated data need strict guardrails.

platforms.name: MarketGuru
platforms.public_evidence_summary: WB-focused analytics, finance, SEO, ads, reviews, inventory and AI recommendations.
platforms.red_team_limitation: Strong decision-support and profit patterns; marketplace-specific coupling must be isolated behind an adapter.

platforms.name: Маяк
platforms.public_evidence_summary: WB/Ozon internal and external analytics, advertising, supply planning, product and financial analytics.
platforms.red_team_limitation: Useful regional supply and demand views; evidence/auditability of public claims is limited.

platforms.name: SellerFox
platforms.public_evidence_summary: External marketplace intelligence with product, seller and brand dynamics, charts and cross-market comparisons.
platforms.red_team_limitation: Useful as a hypothesis source for external demand and competitor signals; weak fit for verified internal financial decisions.

platforms.name: Stat4Market
platforms.public_evidence_summary: The public page identifies WB/Ozon analytics but exposes insufficient verifiable feature detail without client-side execution.
platforms.red_team_limitation: Unscored and deferred. No substantive capability claim is accepted from the available public evidence.

decision_matrix.rationale: The main screen should rank problems and opportunities by expected profit impact, urgency and confidence, then show cause, evidence and next action.
A single marketplace-neutral definition of profit, units, returns, stock and advertising metrics prevents conflicting dashboards.
Prioritize SKU profit, margin, return burden, storage cost, stock-out and overstock risks over gross revenue.
Detect material changes, separate symptom from cause and provide a reproducible evidence trail.
Use marketplace estimates only as preliminary hypotheses, never as confirmed internal facts.
AI may explain evidence, propose scenarios and draft actions, but cannot execute marketplace changes.
These methods require sufficient history, controlled data quality and explicit causal assumptions not yet established for the local pilot.
Useful at larger scale, but conflicts with the present local/offline confidentiality constraint and is unnecessary before stable local workflows.

decision_matrix.pattern: Automatic bids, prices, campaigns, replies or inventory execution
decision_matrix.rationale: Current Quantum scope permits recommendations only and keeps marketplace writes disabled.

decision_matrix.pattern: Opaque estimates or hidden financial defaults
decision_matrix.rationale: A recommendation cannot be confirmed when required inputs, assumptions or source lineage are missing.
Competitive breadth is not a reason to destabilize the existing local pilot or rewrite the architecture.

limitations: Stat4Market unscored due insufficient public evidence.
No UI screenshot or accessibility benchmark.
